TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Abdullah_Sultan_Ahmad_Shah, title = Abdullah_Sultan_Ahmad_Shah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdullah_Sultan_Ahmad_Shah} }

S.FORM: Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah (ryax sa 30 na byacing tay 7 squ kawas na 1959 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Malaysia ta' misuw hya' ga Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah minkahul sa Pekan, Pahang na Malaysia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1959 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah (ryax sa 30 na byacing tay 7 squ kawas na 1959 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Malaysia ta' misuw hya' ga Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Abdullah Sultan Ahmad Shah minkahul sa Pekan, Pahang na Malaysia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1959 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: aβ*ullaħ s~ɕultan aħma* s~ɕħaħ aβ*ullaħ s~ɕultan aħma* s~ɕħaħ (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw malajs~ɕia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*ullaħ s~ɕultan aħma* s~ɕħaħ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral aβ*ullaħ s~ɕultan aħma* s~ɕħaħ minkaħul s~ɕa pekan, paħaŋ na malajs~ɕia. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
